# PDFx

> Copy-paste React PDF components like shadcn/ui. Build professional PDFs with @react-pdf/renderer — you own the code.

PDFx is an open-source React PDF component library that follows the shadcn/ui model: run the CLI to add a component, the source lands in your project and you own it fully. No runtime package dependency, no version lock-in, MIT licensed.

Website: https://pdfx.akashpise.dev  
GitHub: https://github.com/akii09/pdfx  
npm (CLI): https://www.npmjs.com/package/@akii09/pdfx-cli  
License: MIT

## Quick Start

```bash
# Initialise your project (creates pdfx.config.json + theme)
npx @akii09/pdfx-cli init

# Add a component — source is copied into YOUR codebase
npx @akii09/pdfx-cli add table

# Add all components at once
npx @akii09/pdfx-cli add --all

# List available components
npx @akii09/pdfx-cli list

# Add a full pre-built block (invoice, report)
npx @akii09/pdfx-cli block add invoice-modern
npx @akii09/pdfx-cli block list
```

## What is PDFx?

PDFx provides 24 production-ready PDF components built on top of `@react-pdf/renderer`. Instead of importing from a package you cannot customise, you copy the component source directly into your project via the CLI and modify it however you need.

Key traits:
- **No runtime dependency** — after `pdfx add`, you own the file
- **Full TypeScript** — every component is typed with PDFComponentProps
- **Theme system** — Professional, Modern, and Minimal presets; or define your own
- **CLI-driven** — `pdfx add`, `pdfx list`, `pdfx diff`, `pdfx theme` commands
- **MIT licensed** — free forever, no cost

## Theme System

PDFx ships three built-in themes. Switch with:

```bash
npx @akii09/pdfx-cli theme switch modern
```

Themes: `professional` (default), `modern`, `minimal`

Each theme exports a token object used inside components:
```ts
const theme = usePdfxTheme();
// theme.colors.primary, theme.spacing.md, theme.font.sizes.base, ...
```

## Component Reference

All 24 components, their paths, and descriptions:

### Typography
- **Heading** (`/components/heading`) — H1–H6 hierarchy with theme-aware sizing
- **Text** (`/components/text`) — Inline and block text with typographic variants
- **Link** (`/components/link`) — Clickable hyperlinks inside PDF documents

### Layout
- **Stack** (`/components/stack`) — Flexbox container (row or column)
- **Section** (`/components/section`) — Top-level document section with optional title
- **Divider** (`/components/divider`) — Horizontal rule with configurable weight and color
- **Page Break** (`/components/page-break`) — Force content onto a new PDF page
- **Keep Together** (`/components/keep-together`) — Prevent a group from splitting across pages
- **Card** (`/components/card`) — Bordered content card with header and body

### Page Chrome
- **Page Header** (`/components/page-header`) — Fixed header on every page with logo, title, subtitle
- **Page Footer** (`/components/page-footer`) — Fixed footer with contact info or legal copy
- **Page Number** (`/components/page-number`) — Dynamic page X of Y counter
- **Watermark** (`/components/watermark`) — Diagonal or centered text watermark on every page

### Data Display
- **Table** (`/components/table`) — HTML-like table with headers, rows, and alternating stripes
- **Data Table** (`/components/data-table`) — Data-driven table from an object array; columns auto-inferred
- **List** (`/components/list`) — Ordered and unordered lists with custom bullet styles
- **Badge** (`/components/badge`) — Small inline label for statuses, tags, or categories
- **Key Value** (`/components/key-value`) — Two-column label/value pairs (perfect for invoice metadata)
- **Alert** (`/components/alert`) — Info, warning, error, and success callout boxes

### Media & Visuals
- **PDF Image** (`/components/pdf-image`) — Embed raster images with sizing and aspect-ratio control
- **Graph** (`/components/graph`) — SVG bar, line, and pie charts rendered as native PDF vectors
- **QR Code** (`/components/qrcode`) — Scannable QR codes as native PDF vector graphics

### Forms & Documents
- **Form** (`/components/form`) — Labeled field groups for invoices, contracts, and agreements
- **Signature** (`/components/signature`) — Signature block with name, role, date, and underline

## Pre-built Blocks

Blocks are complete multi-component PDF documents you can add with a single command.

### Invoice Blocks
```bash
npx @akii09/pdfx-cli block add invoice-classic
npx @akii09/pdfx-cli block add invoice-modern
npx @akii09/pdfx-cli block add invoice-minimal
npx @akii09/pdfx-cli block add invoice-corporate
npx @akii09/pdfx-cli block add invoice-creative
npx @akii09/pdfx-cli block add invoice-consultant
```

### Report Blocks
```bash
npx @akii09/pdfx-cli block add report-analytics
npx @akii09/pdfx-cli block add report-financial
```

## CLI Command Reference

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `pdfx init` | Scaffold config + theme in your project |
| `pdfx add <component>` | Copy component source into your project |
| `pdfx add --all` | Copy all components at once |
| `pdfx list` | List all available components |
| `pdfx diff <component>` | Show diff between your local copy and latest upstream |
| `pdfx theme init` | Create a custom theme file |
| `pdfx theme switch <name>` | Switch to professional / modern / minimal |
| `pdfx theme validate` | Validate your theme token file |
| `pdfx block add <id>` | Copy a pre-built block into your project |
| `pdfx block list` | List all available blocks |

## Tech Stack

- **Rendering**: `@react-pdf/renderer` v4
- **Language**: TypeScript (strict)
- **Package manager**: pnpm v10 (workspace monorepo)
- **Build**: Vite + Turborepo
- **Linter**: Biome
- **Node.js**: ≥ 24.0.0

## Repository Structure

```
pdfx/
├── apps/
│   ├── playground/   # Dev sandbox for testing components
│   └── www/          # Docs site (Vite React SPA)
├── packages/
│   ├── ui/           # The 24 PDF components (source of truth)
│   ├── cli/          # @akii09/pdfx-cli — the add/init/theme commands
│   └── shared/       # Shared types, errors, schema validation
└── docs/             # Architecture and decision docs
```

- Blocks: https://pdfx.akashpise.dev/blocks
